action.reasoning: Observation: iter_13 eval failed because current model.py's ClimateResCNN doesn't match the checkpoint architecture saved in iter_8. Missing keys: scalar_fc.2.* (current model has Linear at index 2). Unexpected keys: blocks.*.skip.* (current ResBlock uses Identity when channels match, but checkpoint always used Conv1d skip), scalar_fc.3.* (checkpoint has Dropout at index 2 and Linear at index 3). Analysis: The model.py was rewritten between iter_8 and now, and the truncation hides the exact architecture. I need to inspect the actual checkpoint keys to reconstruct precisely, then fix model.py. With 27 min remaining, a quick inspection script (seconds) followed by a model.py rewrite is the safest path. Decision: Write inspect_checkpoint.py to dump all state_dict keys, load checkpoint config, and print model structure so I can exactly match it. Then fix model.py accordingly and submit eval.
